recap: Renamed NOTION_API_KEY → NOTION_TOKEN in notion-api, notion-api-post, notion-api-patch; added missing guard to notion-api-patch; wrote bats tests for all three.
Replaced notion-api call with `notion block list <page_id> --md`; rewrote tests to mock notion binary and assert Markdown output.
Replaced notion-api-post call with `notion db query | jq`; rewrote tests to mock notion binary and assert JSON array shape with exactly {id, date, tags, title}.
Updated SKILL.md Step 1 to describe the minimal JSON array {id, date, tags, title} and Step 3 to state output is pure Markdown.
